name: lacasastudio
description: LaCasaStudio V2.3 — YouTube Production OS (TypeScript + Tailwind + PostgreSQL + Tests)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed && cd ../client && npm install && npm run build
